SELECT array_apply(list_data, x -> x + 1) FROM test_array_apply;
SELECT array_apply(ARRAY[10, 20, 30], x -> x * 2) AS doubled_values;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, num_array ARRAY<Integer>);
INSERT INTO additional_data VALUES (1, ARRAY[1, 2]), (2, ARRAY[3, 4]);
SELECT a.id, array_apply(a.num_array, x -> x + b.value) FROM additional_data a JOIN (SELECT 10 AS value) b ON a.id = 1;
SELECT array_apply(list_data, x -> array_apply(ARRAY[x], y -> y * 3)) FROM test_array_apply;
SELECT array_apply(ARRAY[NULL, 5, 10], x -> IFNULL(x, 0)) AS transform_nulls;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (data ARRAY<Integer>, multiplier INT);
SELECT array_apply(data, x -> x * multiplier) FROM complex_data;
SELECT array_apply((SELECT ARRAY[1, 2, 3]), x -> x * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complex_data)) AS scaled_values;
